channel.title: AEO on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in AEO on Junho Lee

item.title: 5. AEO - Why Coding Agents Read Documentation Differently
item.description: If GEO optimizes for consumer AI, AEO optimizes for coding agents. This article covers document length constraints, llms.txt, skill.md, and AGENTS.md — the files that matter.
